category_sources: Official Apache Pig site https://pig.apache.org/ describes Pig as a platform for analyzing large data sets.
source_facts.description says "Platform for analyzing large data sets".
display_name_sources: Official Apache Pig site https://pig.apache.org/ uses the display name Apache Pig.
docs_sources: Official Apache Pig site links documentation from https://pig.apache.org/.
Official documentation is published under https://pig.apache.org/docs/latest/.
repo_sources: Official Apache Pig version-control page https://pig.apache.org/version_control.html says the source code resides in the Apache Subversion repository and gives https://svn.apache.org/repos/asf/pig/ for committers plus http://svn.apache.org/repos/asf/pig/ for anonymous access.
tags_sources: Official Apache Pig site https://pig.apache.org/ describes Pig Latin and infrastructure that compiles to Map-Reduce programs.
source_facts.description identifies large data set analysis.
